name: Lucas Pereira
use_case: Migrating SMS notifications from Twilio to a Brazil-local provider
original_message: Oi, somos da Olist e estamos avaliando trocar a Twilio por um provedor com presenca local no Brasil. Voces tem rota direta com as operadoras?
quinn_reply: Hi Lucas — yes, Telnyx runs direct carrier interconnects in Brazil. Quick question: roughly what's your current monthly SMS volume? A human SDR will follow up within 4 business hours with pricing tailored to your scale.
